turns.user_message: I noticed I've been apologizing for my opinions lately. That used to not bother me at all.
I keep shrinking myself down so I don't take up space. I feel like my thoughts aren't worth sharing anymore.
I feel completely invisible because I've silenced myself for so long. It's like I'm just a ghost watching my own life.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with something they noticed about themselves. This used to not bother the speaker.
